summary: PWA Smart App Banner feature verified - all 5 test cases passed. Banner correctly appears on mobile iOS/Android, hides on desktop, respects localStorage persistence, and dismiss button works as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA Install Banner testing complete. Used Python Playwright with mobile user agents (iOS: iPhone UA, Android: Pixel 8 UA) to properly test banner visibility. Key test scenarios: 1) iOS shows banner with 'How?' button that toggles iOS guide, 2) Android shows banner after 2s fallback timer with 'Install' button, 3) Desktop does not show banner, 4) localStorage pwa_installed=true hides banner, 5) Dismiss X button sets localStorage and hides banner. All data-testid attributes work correctly: pwa-install-banner, pwa-install-btn, pwa-dismiss-btn, pwa-ios-guide, pwa-banner-spacer.

ios_banner.details: Banner appears on iOS mobile UA, 'How?' button toggles iOS guide showing Share and Add to Home Screen instructions, button changes to 'Got it' after click

android_banner.details: Banner appears after 2s fallback timer on Android mobile UA, 'Install' button shown

desktop_no_banner.details: Banner NOT in DOM on desktop user agent (correct behavior)

localstorage_persistence.details: Banner not rendered when pwa_installed=true in localStorage

dismiss_button.details: Clicking X sets localStorage pwa_installed=true and removes banner from DOM
